### 2014431
**Gumball S03E03 - The Coach**  
🆕 TV-Y7-FV 🔓 11:26  
⌛ June 15, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=835928&titleid=2014431&mediaid=7789dd5f68a4389f1190d50fc974488ab9f4d02d) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/gumball/the-coach-episode.html  
seriesid=`835928` titleid=`2014431` mediaid=`7789dd5f68a4389f1190d50fc974488ab9f4d02d`  
_The new coach at Elmore High stands up to Jamie. The new Coach witnesses Jamie bullying the other kids at lunch and steps in. Jamie is made to apologise, much to the amazement of the other kids. Gumball and Darwin worry about Jamie seeking revenge, especially when they see him sneaking into the back of Coach's car. They use their newly acquired gym skills to save the Coach from being bullied._

_Miss Simian has to save herself from a contagious Joy virus infecting the whole school. After Dad gives Gumball and Darwin a special hug, the kids go to school filled with a virulent form of Joy. Miss Simian quickly identifies the terrible affliction, and soon enough it spreads to the other kids. She has to find a cure before it's too late. Before Ms Simian herself is won over by . . . Joy._

_The kids finally get the puppy they always wanted, except . . . it's actually a turtle, and it hates them. After begging Dad for a puppy, the kids are taken aback when he comes home with a turtle. Despite the fact that the turtle turns out to be extremely aggressive (especially toward Gumball) they try their best to give it the love it deserves. This achieves nothing. The Evil Turtle escapes and goes on a rampage, and they have to find it before it destroys Elmore._

### 2014434
**Gumball S03E41 - The Recipe**  
🆕 TV-Y7-FV 🔓 11:26  
⌛ June 15, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=835928&titleid=2014434&mediaid=d85beef63b328157d2b77c7b713583d5b84be0e5) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/gumball/the-recipe-episode.html

_Gumball and Darwin discover the secret behind Anton's immortality. Anton's little toasty body disintegrates during a swim class. When Gumball and Darwin see Anton the next day, as good as new, they set out to discover his secret. It turns out that his parents use a special formula to bake new Antons when necessary. So the kids test it out at home and end up baking a clone army whose leader - Ant-one - wants to destroy Anton and take over the world._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014434_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
### 2014430
**Gumball S02E02 - The Fan**  
🆕 TV-Y7-FV 🔓 11:26  
⌛ June 15, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=835928&titleid=2014430&mediaid=47b849edd94b311983ad44c1fbb99ee98447bcaa) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/gumball/the-fan-episode.html  
seriesid=`835928` titleid=`2014430` mediaid=`47b849edd94b311983ad44c1fbb99ee98447bcaa`  
_Sarah, the new kid in school, is Gumball and Darwin's number one, slightly obsessive, fan. Sarah is intensely following Gumball and Darwin around trying to win their friendship.  When Gumball tells her that she is acting like a stalker, she embraces it and actually takes it up a notch.  However, when Gumball and Darwin realise that she's behaving this way because she's lonely, they go to surprising lengths to make her feel accepted._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014430_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
